page_content:
HEBR199 Special Topics in Hebrew (3 Credits)

Topics in language, literature, and culture. Varies by semester and instructor.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures department.

Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

258 HEBR - Hebrew
